channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SIGNATURE] Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. Approves Acquisition of Residential Project and Transfer of Shares in Subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. announced the outcomes of its board meeting held on 29th March, 2026. The company approved the acquisition of a residential project from its subsidiary, Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL), for a lumpsum consideration of Rs. 50,00,00,000. The company also approved the transfer and sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) at a price of Rs. 158.84 per share, amounting to a total consideration of ~Rs. 56.70 crores. This transaction will result in GCL ceasing to be a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. The board meeting concluded at 18:48 Hours.

  • Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. approved the acquisition of a residential project from its subsidiary, Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL), for a lumpsum consideration of Rs. 50,00,00,000.
  • The company also approved the transfer and sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) at a price of Rs. 158.84 per share, amounting to a total consideration of ~Rs. 56.70 crores.
  • Upon transfer of the shares, GCL will cease to be the wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
  • The transaction will be effective upon the execution of a Business Transfer Agreement, Joint Development Agreement, and other related documents.
  • The board meeting was held on 29th March, 2026, and concluded at 18:48 Hours.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Signatureglobal (India) Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ICICIGI] ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd Receives Stay Order on GST Demand of ₹ 31,18,41,716/-
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd has received an order from the Hon’ble Bombay High Court granting a stay on the impugned order till the final disposal of the Writ Petition. The impugned order, raised a GST demand of ₹ 31,18,41,716/- under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 along with interest and a penalty of the same amount for the period July 2017 to March 2024 covering various states. The dispute pertains to the applicability of GST on supplies of Group Health Insurance/ Group Personal Accident policies to units located within a Special Economic Zone, which is an industry-wide issue.

  • ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd has received a stay order from the Hon’ble Bombay High Court on an impugned order raising a GST demand of ₹ 31,18,41,716/-
  • The stay order is granted till the final disposal of the Writ Petition
  • The impugned order also imposed a penalty of ₹ 31,18,41,716/- under Section 74 read with Section 122 of the Act
  • The dispute pertains to the applicability of GST on supplies of Group Health Insurance/ Group Personal Accident policies to units located within a Special Economic Zone
  • The Hon’ble Court has granted four weeks time to the Revenue to file their reply

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SIGNATURE] Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. Approves Acquisition of Residential Project and Transfer of Shares in Subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. announced the outcomes of its board meeting held on 29th March, 2026. The company has approved the acquisition of a residential project from its subsidiary, Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL), for a lumpsum consideration of Rs. 50,00,00,000. The acquisition is pursuant to a Securities Subscription and Purchase Agreement (SSPA) and will be effective through a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA), Joint Development Agreement, and other related documents. Additionally, the board approved the transfer and sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) at a price of Rs. 158.84 per share, which will result in GCL ceasing to be a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. The total consideration for this transfer is approximately Rs. 56.70 crores. The revised consideration for RMZ to acquire 50% of GCL's share capital is up to ~Rs. 1293.47 crores.

  • Signatureglobal (India) Ltd. to acquire a residential project from its subsidiary, Gurugram Commercity Limited (GCL), for a lumpsum consideration of Rs. 50,00,00,000.
  • The acquisition will be effective through a Business Transfer Agreement (BTA), Joint Development Agreement, and other related documents.
  • The board approved the transfer and sale of 35,69,731 equity shares of GCL to Millennia Realtors Private Limited (RMZ) at a price of Rs. 158.84 per share.
  • Upon transfer of the shares, GCL will cease to be a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company.
  • The revised consideration for RMZ to acquire 50% of GCL's share capital is up to ~Rs. 1293.47 crores.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Signatureglobal (India) Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RLFL] Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q4 and Year-End Results
item.description:
Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for the financial results of the fourth quarter and year ending on 31-03-2026. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders. The trading window will be closed from Wednesday, 01st April, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the submission of the audited Financial Results of the Company for the Fourth Quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026 to the Stock Exchange. The date of the Board of Meeting for the review and approval of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 will be intimated in due course.

  • Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd closes trading window for Q4 and year-end results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after submission of audited financial results
  • Board of Meeting date for review and approval of audited financial results to be intimated later
  • Company encourages stakeholders to take note and acknowledge

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ramchandra Leasing & Finance Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Third Phase of 11.429 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Surya Power Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the third phase of a 11.429 MW / 51.354 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project. This project is located at Village: Jaimalsar, Dist: Bikaner, State: Rajasthan. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this phase is set for March 31, 2026. With this commissioning, ACME Surya Power Private Limited has achieved a total commissioned capacity of 107.143 MW / 481.440 MWh out of the total 250 MW / 1103.392 MWh capacity.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited commissions third phase of 11.429 MW / 51.354 MWh BESS project in Rajasthan.
  • Project located at Village: Jaimalsar, Dist: Bikaner, State: Rajasthan.
  • Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the third phase set for March 31, 2026.
  • ACME Surya Power Private Limited achieves 107.143 MW / 481.440 MWh commissioned capacity out of 250 MW / 1103.392 MWh.
  • Total 11.429 MW / 51.354 MWh commissioned in the third phase of the BESS project.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Commissioning

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail & Engineering Secures Rs. 22.91 Crore Order from North Central Railway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has received an order worth Rs. 22.91 Crore (excluding taxes) from North Central Railway for reliability improvement of Track circuits by provision of MSDAC in parallel of existing DCTC and other associated work at 14 stations of Prayagraj Division. The entire work is to be completed within 180 days.

  • Order worth Rs. 22.91 Crore from North Central Railway
  • Reliability improvement of Track circuits by provision of MSDAC in parallel of existing DCTC and other associated work
  • Work to be completed within 180 days

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [THYROCARE] Thyrocare Technologies Ltd Receives Notice of Demand from Income Tax Department for ₹2,02,82,260
item.description:
Thyrocare Technologies Ltd has received a Notice of Demand under Section 156 of the Income-tax Act, 1961, from the Income Tax Department dated March 27, 2026. The demand of ₹2,02,82,260 has been raised for the Assessment Year 2024-25. The Company is evaluating the matter and will submit an appropriate response before the appropriate authority within the prescribed timelines. The financial exposure of ₹2,02,82,260 arises on account of the liability determined by the department, but the demand will be contested before the authorities within the stipulated timelines as provided under the law.

  • Thyrocare Technologies Ltd received a Notice of Demand under Section 156 of the Income-tax Act, 1961, from the Income Tax Department.
  • The demand of ₹2,02,82,260 has been raised for the Assessment Year 2024-25.
  • The Company is evaluating the matter and will submit an appropriate response before the appropriate authority within the prescribed timelines.
  • The financial exposure of ₹2,02,82,260 arises on account of the liability determined by the department.
  • The demand will be contested before the authorities within the stipulated timelines as provided under the law.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Thyrocare Technologies Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [KALAMANDIR] Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd. Extends Timeline for Utilization of IPO Proceeds
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd. has announced the extension of the timeline for utilization of IPO proceeds up to September 30, 2026. The extension is primarily due to operational efficiency, savings achieved under the capital expenditure head, and time involved in identifying and finalizing a suitable location for a new warehouse project. The company has successfully achieved and exceeded the targeted retail footprint and has identified a strategic location at Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu for the warehouse. The unutilized funds will be deployed towards setting up 4 additional stores and establishing a warehouse facility at Kanchipuram.

  • Extension of timeline for utilization of IPO proceeds up to September 30, 2026
  • Successful achievement and exceeding of targeted retail footprint
  • Savings achieved under the capital expenditure head
  • Identification of a strategic location for a new warehouse project
  • Deployment of unutilized funds towards setting up 4 additional stores and establishing a warehouse facility

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sai Silks (Kalamandir) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [PNGJL] P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd Opens 2 New Stores, Total Now Stands at 78
item.description:
P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd has announced the opening of 2 new stores on March 29, 2026. The first store is located at R Square Runwal, LBS Road, Mulund, Mumbai, Maharashtra – 400080 and was opened at around 12:30 P.M. The second store is situated at Livin Solitaire, Canada Corner, Nashik, Maharashtra - 422005, and began operations at around 05:00 P.M. This development brings the total number of stores to 78.

  • P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd opens 2 new stores
  • First store located at R Square Runwal, Mulund, Mumbai
  • Second store situated at Livin Solitaire, Nashik
  • Total number of stores now stands at 78
  • New stores opened on March 29, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DBEIL] Deepak Builders Bags L1 Status for ₹474.25 Cr Residential Project at Indian Oil Panipat Refinery Township
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has emerged as the lowest (L1) bidder for a residential infrastructure project adjacent to the Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township of Indian Oil Corporation Limited in Haryana. The project, valued at ₹474.25 crore, involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings using advanced monolithic construction technology. This development is expected to significantly enhance the company's revenue visibility, reinforcing its strong position in executing large-scale, complex, and technology-driven infrastructure projects within institutional and industrial ecosystems.

  • Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has secured L1 status for a residential infrastructure project at Indian Oil Corporation Limited's Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township.
  • The project is valued at ₹474.25 crore and involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings using advanced monolithic construction technology.
  • Upon formal award, DBEIL’s total order book is expected to scale to approximately ₹32,000 crore, significantly enhancing revenue visibility.
  • This development reinforces Deepak Builders’ strong positioning in executing large-scale, complex, and technology-driven infrastructure projects.
  • The demand for modern residential infrastructure within industrial clusters is expected to remain robust, creating sustained opportunities for experienced EPC players.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deepak Builders and Engineers India Ltd | Category: New Launch
